Hi!

I enjoy designing products around real-world needs, and creating content that leaves a lasting impression.

I grew up in Kuwait, studied Business Economics at UCLA, and now live in Los Angeles. In my free time, I lift, run, read, dance, and also create Excel spreadsheets (well, that is my 9-5!).

my story

click to flip

hi! i'm kimaya.

i create content and design products. i currently work in accounting in los angeles — i graduated from ucla in 2025 with a major in business economics and a minor in accounting.

i can't imagine doing one thing for the rest of my life. my mission is to explore, create, and do hundreds of side quests <3

outside work, i enjoy lifting, running, dancing, and exploring different cafes! i did my first half-marathon last year and i'm training for a marathon this year. my main goal? become an ironman.

"i believe empathy solves most problems — in life and in business. whether it's media or technology, my mission is to inspire people to explore, create, and experience life boldly."
